rootCause: The stable fingerprint included sha256 and sizeBytes from the Google XLSX round-trip proof diagnostic. Google exports were semantically identical but ZIP bytes were not deterministic between exports.
correctionForFutureRounds: Exclude only sha256 and sizeBytes from the non-material xlsx_roundtrip_export_inspected diagnostic in stable fingerprints. Keep the diagnostic and proof metadata in saved results.
requiredRetest: A newly frozen round must rerun stability after the correction.
